overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character navigating through a prison or detention facility with metal-barred cells, concrete floors, and industrial architecture. The character moves through various indoor sections including open cell blocks, narrow corridors, and a sunlit upper level, passing NPCs and environmental details like vending machines and crates.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a ground floor prison cell block with metal bars visible on both sides. The environment features industrial concrete flooring, an upper catwalk, and vending machines placed against the walls. A few NPCs are scattered throughout, including a person in a yellow shirt standing near the cells on the right.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed corridor connecting cell blocks, with plain walls and framed pictures mounted on the left. The space is dimly lit with artificial lighting. An NPC in an orange outfit approaches from the opposite direction.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow corridor, the character enters another cell block area featuring wooden crates and boxes scattered throughout the space. The environment includes metal cell bars on both sides and poster stands. Several NPCs are present, including a person in a green shirt near the crates and another in blue walking past.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow corridor marked with A-1 signage, walking toward a bright exit at the far end. The lighting transitions from artificial to mixed as natural light streams in from the opening ahead. An NPC in white walks ahead toward the light.

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a sunlit upper level cell block featuring large barred windows on the left that cast dramatic shadow patterns across the floor. The environment includes prison cells on the right, vending machines along the left wall, and a dark stairwell visible at the far end. NPCs walk through the space, including a person in yellow approaching from the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a series of industrial prison blocks and corridors that transition from dim, enclosed interiors to a bright, sunlit upper level. It begins on a ground floor cell block with concrete flooring and vending machines, moving past metal bars and scattered NPCs before entering a narrow, dimly lit corridor lined with framed pictures. As the camera exits this passage, the space opens back into another cell block filled with wooden crates and poster stands, then tightens once more into a corridor marked with A-1 signage. The lighting shifts from artificial gloom to a brilliant glow as the camera follows an NPC toward a bright exit, finally emerging into a sunlit upper level where large barred windows cast dramatic shadows across the floor and vending machines line the walls.
